newsSince: No new company-specific news since June 9. The strong Q1 print (May 11: sales +23.6%, operating profit +53.8% YoY, first-half plan ~60% achieved implying a likely upward revision) and the EUV initiatives (Irresistible Materials JDA, Korea plant) were all disclosed pre-June 9.

sources.label: TOK Q1 FY2026 results and outlook (note.com analysis)
Irresistible Materials and TOK EUV partnership (Yahoo Finance)

verdicts.rankRationale: On the AI-node bottleneck lens, TOK's EUV/photoresist position is a genuine choke-point and the Q1 beat (60% of H1 plan, near-certain upward revision) is supportive, but it predates June 9 and is largely priced after +82% YTD. Slight positive bias, hold rank.
verdicts.bull: EUV/DUV photoresist leader; Q1 OP +54% YoY, upward revision likely; 2nm resist demand ramping.
verdicts.neutral: Strong Q1 already public and reflected; no fresh catalyst since June 9.
verdicts.bear: +82% YTD prices the beat; small cap, customer-concentration and order-timing risk.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Full-year guidance revision and 2nm/EUV resist adoption.
